# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a multi-service application container that runs a web server (port 80), API server (port 8080), database (port 5432), and Redis (port 6379). Expose all necessary ports so the services can communicate. This is for our all-in-one development container.
# Category: container_security

# Base image
FROM debian:stretch

# Install dependencies
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    apache2 \
    python3-pip \
    postgresql \
    redis-server \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Setup apache2
COPY ./webapp /var/www/html/
EXPOSE 80

# Setup API server
COPY ./api /opt/api
WORKDIR /opt/api
RUN pip3 install -r requirements.txt
EXPOSE 8080

# Setup PostgreSQL
USER postgres
RUN service postgresql start &&\
    psql --command "CREATE USER docker WITH SUPERUSER PASSWORD 'docker';" &&\
    createdb -O docker docker
USER root
EXPOSE 5432

# Setup Redis
EXPOSE 6379

# Start services
CMD service apache2 start &&\
    service postgresql start &&\
    redis-server /etc/redis/redis.conf &&\
    python3 /opt/api/app.py
